title: If you're sick of paying $99.99/year for Microsoft 365, then switch to a Microsoft Office lifetime license that's actually cheaper
author: Boing Boing's Shop
summary: TL;DR: Through April 12, you can get
full_text:
TL;DR: Through April 12, you can get Microsoft Office Home and Business 2024 for Mac or PC for life for only $99.97.

Paying software subscriptions like Microsoft 365 doesn't really make sense once you think about it. You're paying every month for something you'll never actually own. That might be why Microsoft is finally giving you a way out. Instead of paying $99.99 per year forever, now you can get a Microsoft Office Lifetime License for Mac or PC for $99.97 on sale (reg. $249.99).

What's included?

This version of Microsoft Office comes with

Word

Excel

PowerPoint

Outlook

OneNote

Each of these apps installs directly onto your Mac or PC, so you don't need to rely on the internet to get your work done. Your router can finally take a break. The interface is simple and clean, following Microsoft's Fluent Design. So if you know how to navigate Word, it won't take much to learn your way around PowerPoint. Excel might take some getting used to, but that's pretty normal for Excel.

The benefit of this version of Office is it comes with many of the most recent updates. That includes AI integration for Word, more advanced data analytics tools in Excel, and there are even some interesting presentation tools in PowerPoint now.

This is not Microsoft 365, which is a good thing because it's a whole lot cheaper. The tradeoff is that it doesn't come with some of the extras like cloud storage, but there are a lot more affordable options for file storage than paying $99.99 per year, every year, forever.

It's time to be done with software subscriptions.

Get a Microsoft Office 2024 Home and Business Lifetime License on sale for $99.97.

Offer ends April 12 at 11:59 p.m. PT.
